inputs.price_source: PSE edge stock data (cmpy_id=478) last traded PHP 211.00; Stooq/Yahoo unavailable for PH listing
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 consolidated OCF PHP 1,429.6M minus capital spending PHP 204.2M, divided by 82.27M outstanding shares; ~6% haircut for PDSHC integration and FVTPL volatility (audited_financials_dec_2025.pdf, annual_report_2025.pdf)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 post-PDSHC consolidation treated as mid-cycle run rate; not peak 2024 pre-consolidation revenue

bear.notes: Philippine equity turnover slump, lower transaction fees, mark-to-market losses on treasury investments, multiple compression

base.notes: Mid-cycle owner cash after PDSHC stack; listing fee amortization, PDTC/PDEx trading toll, regular PHP 10 dividend

bull.notes: Sustained market activity, ASEAN sustainability/data products, limited fee regulation

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Book value per share PHP 67.35 FY2025; investment property and FVTPL marked; no land-at-cost pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Exchange and market infrastructure toll; not resource royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 consolidated net income PHP 1.224B on gross revenue PHP 2.843B

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Listing fees deferred over 15-year listed life per PFRS 15; PHP 147.6M received vs PHP 91.7M recognized in 9M2025 (quarterly_report_3q_2025.pdf)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: PDSHC now consolidated; remaining 7.94% non-controlling interest immaterial to thesis

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Regular cash dividend PHP 10 per share FY2025; not a dated recovery

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: PDSHC/PDTC/PDEx depository and trading stack embedded in post-2025 revenue base; ASEAN ESG data marketplace in development

option_scan.question: Material separate option terminals required?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient after scan

items: Confirm PHP spot price via PSE edge or local broker; Stooq/Yahoo do not cover PSE.PH
Review FY2025 annual report narrative sections when full 77-page extract is tier-upgraded

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
